name: dacosta-technologies-github-profile
description: GitHub organization profile for Da Costa Technologies.

scripts.generate: node scripts/generate-hero.js && node scripts/generate-capabilities-map.js && node scripts/generate-stack-strip.js
scripts.check:syntax: for file in scripts/*.js; do node --check "$file"; done
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run generate && npm run check:assets
